response.overview: Pitisara Kella is a 1953 Sri Lankan film directed by Sirisena Wimalaweera. The film stars Theresa Weerasinghe,  A. Shanthapriya,  Malini Ranasinghe,  L. M. Fernando,  E. Marshall Perera,  S. D. Elizabeth,  S. H. Jothipala,  Ayesha Weerakoon, Hugo Fernando. Released on 24 April. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Pitisara Kella
